warnings.message: Some input files use or override a deprecated API.

edits.description: PR-mined: real upstream commit fd799d4ef9a53be68c3d3323710071cf2adb936d ('Translated using Weblate (English)', privacy-friendly-ruler). Retranslates a couple of strings (okay -> Ok; viewhelp picks up a stray French string, a genuine upstream Weblate mistranslation bug) plus incidental whitespace/XML-declaration normalization. No new string names, so no R regen needed -- resources-only relink.

PR-mined: real upstream commit 37b67200487beee92bf018c76cd6e43e518ad30d ('Translated using Weblate (German)', privacy-friendly-ruler). Retranslates pref_rightruler_default/pref_anglemeasure_default and a few other German strings; whitespace normalization. Applied as a full-file replacement (not a .patch) because vendor.json deliberately vendors two files both basenamed strings.xml (default + values-de) and fetch_vendored.py's patch step keys its base-file lookup on basename alone -- see vendor.json's note. No new string names, resources-only relink.

PR-mined: real upstream commit 51ffdbe27050d624f9b75032d429a60176255fd8 ('Added translation using Weblate (French)', privacy-friendly-ruler). Adds a brand-new values-fr/strings.xml -- but the real commit's file is an empty placeholder (<resources></resources>, no <string> entries yet), so it introduces zero new R.string names despite being a whole new resource file. editClass deliberately omits 'add' (the README's R-regen trigger substring): no new resource NAMES exist to regenerate R for, only a new (empty) qualifier directory.

gaps: no --compose-plugin-jar/--compose-runtime-jar: apps with "compose": true SKIPPED in this run
